summary: A Go-based orchestration tool (GOrchestra) that detects, runs, and reports on assertions with plugin and Kubernetes support.
concerns: frequent stale worktree and session cleanup chores indicate flaky session management
automated agent session archiving commits suggest unstable CI or agent orchestration
no visible entry point (cmd/) in key files suggests potential incomplete structure
suggestions: investigate root cause of stale worktree generation to reduce cleanup overhead
review plugin integration and ensure interfaces are well-documented
